── treatise: liberty ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

     ║                      Procedural liberty                      ║
     ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
  ////º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~~º~\\\\

     ▀██▀      ▀██▀      ▀██▀      ▀██▀      ▀██▀      ▀██▀      ▀██▀
      ██        ██        ██        ██        ██        ██        ██
      ██        ██        ██        ██        ██        ██        ██
    Speech   Assembly    Due     Property  Suffrage  Redress   Contract
      ██        ██     process      ██        ██        ██        ██
      ██        ██        ██        ██        ██        ██        ██
      ██        ██        ██        ██        ██        ██        ██
     ▄██▄      ▄██▄      ▄██▄      ▄██▄      ▄██▄      ▄██▄      ▄██▄
   ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║                             Natural rights                             ║
╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

legend:
  ^  Procedural liberty: Liberty is a property of procedure, not outcomes.
  ii Speech: Expression without prior restraint.
  ii Assembly: Collective gathering and petition.
  ii Due process: Adjudication by neutral rule.
  ii Property: Stable claim against arbitrary seizure.
  ii Suffrage: Participation in collective choice.
  ii Redress: Recourse against state action.
  ii Contract: Free exchange under enforced terms.
  _  Natural rights: The classical liberal substrate.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── built with _ii^ ──
